questions.q: Which golfer issued a public apology on April 14, 2026, for breaking his driver against a cooler during the final round of the Masters?
questions.correctText: Sergio Garcia received a code-of-conduct warning and later apologized for slamming his driver into the turf and snapping it against a cooler.

questions.q: Sony Pictures Boss Tom Rothman recently urged theater owners to stop doing what before movies start?
options: Showing 30 minutes of trailers and commercials
questions.correctText: Showing 30 minutes of trailers and commercials

questions.q: In April 2026, the largest shareholder of which legendary shoot 'em up developer offered $600k of her own funds to help the studio pivot to console game development?
In response to pressure from Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and MAHA figures, the FDA announced it will hold a meeting this summer to consider easing restrictions on what unapproved therapies?
Marvel recently laid off what percentage of its staff amid companywide Disney cuts?
An analysis of MRI scans published in the journal Radiology revealed that diets high in ultraprocessed foods are contributing to what unusual phenomenon in human thighs?
options: Fat marbling that resembles high-end steaks
questions.correctText: Fat marbling that resembles high-end steaks

questions.q: What is the name of the new PvP-free starter region introduced to EVE Online in April 2026 to help new players safely learn the basics of the game?
On April 14, 2026, THQ Nordic announced release dates for the PlayStation and Xbox ports of which classic RPG trilogy?
An AI analysis of over 400,000 social media posts suggests that clinical trials for GLP-1 weight-loss drugs may have missed which common side effects?
options: Menstrual irregularities and temperature-related issues like chills
questions.correctText: Menstrual irregularities and temperature-related issues like chills

questions.q: Which two actors were recently reported to have signed an open letter joining the fight to block the Paramount-Warner Bros. merger?
